__comment: Tiles run DQL over the compliance bucket, grouped by net_role/net_site. No device is named, so tiles never orphan on hardware change.

tiles.name: Pass/Fail by role
tiles.query: fetch logs, from: -30d | filter log.source == "ansible-compliance" | summarize failed = sum(toLong(failed_count)), by: {net_role}

tiles.name: Failed controls trend
tiles.query: fetch logs, from: -90d | filter log.source == "ansible-compliance" | filter toLong(failed_count) > 0 | makeTimeseries count(), by: {net_role}
